items.title: Spurs stay up as West Ham relegated from EPL
items.summary: Tottenham have avoided relegation from the Premier League on the final day of the 2025-26 season.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Kyle Williams is working to earn more reps and targets in his second season
items.summary: Patriots receiver Kyle Williams, a third-round pick in 2025, had only 10 catches as a rookie, and only two in four postseason games.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Raducanu beaten in French Open first round
items.summary: Emma Raducanu's French Open campaign comes to an early end as she suffers a frustrating first-round defeat by Argentina's Solana Sierra.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
